goal: Rewrite OpsPanel as StatusPanel — system overview HUD

risks: Renaming 'ops' to 'status' touches multiple files — easy to miss a reference and break tab routing or badge display
Velocity section requires directiveHistory data that may not be reliably populated yet
Full rewrite of a 506-line panel in one shot risks layout/styling regressions
over_engineering_flags: Brainstorm scope is well-contained — 4 sections using existing data, no new APIs or server changes needed.

projects.title: Rewrite OpsPanel as StatusPanel with system overview
projects.scope_summary: Full rewrite of OpsPanel.tsx into StatusPanel with 4 sections: System Vitals KPI strip, Active Directives with pipeline progress, Velocity metrics, and Session Health distribution. Rename all 'ops' references to 'status' across SidePanel.tsx, useBadgeCounts.ts, panels/index.ts, and any other files. Delete all dead categories/features/backlogs code.
